Peel-and-stick subway tile is a renter's best friend.

This tiny kitchen looks completely transformed with just a backsplash swap.

Tap link in bio to shop the look.

#PeelAndStick #SubwayTile #RenterFriendly #SmallKitchen #KitchenMakeover #ApartmentDecor #BacksplashIdeas #TinyKitchen #KitchenInspo #BudgetDecor #SmallSpaceKitchen #AestheticKitchen

rejected.title: (planned) Small Apartment Dining Nook Built-In Banquette Window Aesthetic Renter
rejected.reason: Image too soft / painterly - bay window panes mushy, lamp lacks crisp edges, bench upholstery has no texture detail. Caught at drag-drop step, not posted to Pinterest.
rejected.regen_plan: Re-render with stronger photorealistic emphasis. Moved file to _qa_rejected/ to prevent reuse. Replaced today's slot with bistro_round (id 34).
